rationale: deg12 ±5 not exposed by lehmer_brute_force.DEGREE constant; deg14 ±3 brute-force run estimated ~3 minutes but smaller subspace likely yields 0 verification_failed entries (the 17 are the ±5 boundary layer). Synthetic x->-x reflection preserves M(P), palindromicity, and class_post_fold but flips intra-fold class labels — clean overfit-detection probe.
